Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 3 0 0}...At least, I want to. But I've actually got somewhere to be today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 4 0 0}I'll tell you, but don't laugh, okay?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 5 0 0}I'm going to the public library...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 6 0 0}'Cause, like, there weren't any books about sports physiology and stuff at the school library...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 7 0 0}I'm gonna head out first to get some studying done, okay?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 8 0 0}Then again... since we've already bumped into each other, I kinda wanna chat for a bit.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 9 0 0}Wanna walk me to the entrance...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 13 0 0}I'm actually planning on going to the public library...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 14 0 0}'Cause, like, there weren't any books about sports physiology and stuff at the school library...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 15 0 0}I'm gonna head out first to get some studying done, okay?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 17 0 0}Then again... since we've already bumped into each other, I kinda wanna chat for a bit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 3 0 0}...At least, I want to. But I've actually got somewhere to be today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 4 0 0}I'll tell you, but don't laugh, okay?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 5 0 0}I'm going to the public library...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 6 0 0}'Cause, like, there weren't any books about sports physiology at the school library...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 7 0 0}I wanna try studying stuff like that now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 8 0 0}Hmmm... But since we've already bumped into each other, wanna chat for a little longer?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 9 0 0}At least until we reach the entrance?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 12 0 0}I'm actually planning on going to the public library...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 13 0 0}'Cause, like, there weren't any books about sports physiology and stuff at the school library...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 14 0 0}I'm gonna head out first to get some studying done, okay?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 15 0 0}I mean, if I had a friend there, we'd totally end up chatting the whole time instead of studying![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 16 0 0}Hmmm... But since we've already bumped into each other, wanna chat for a little longer?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 17 0 0}At least until we reach the entrance?[n]{f 1 1}
